sn45.37:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you brahminhood and the fruits of brahminhood. Listen to that …
sn45.37:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is brahminhood? It is this Noble Eightfold Path; that is, right view … right concentration. This is called brahminhood.
sn45.37:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, are the fruits of brahminhood? sn.v.26 The fruit of stream-entry, the fruit of once-returning, the fruit of nonreturning, the fruit of arahantship. These are called the fruits of brahminhood."
